## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why is it needed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing and `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] If rules changed: edited `standard/build_pdf.py` and regenerated (did **not**
      hand-edit `internal/rules/manifest.yaml`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Fail-closed posture preserved (no check returns a silent `PASS`)
